mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO order_refund_task ( order_id, refund_type, amount, status, idempotency_key, retry_count, next_retry_time, fail_reason, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{refundType}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{retryCount}, #{nextRetryTime}, #{failReason}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id AS orderId, refund_type AS refundType, amount, status, idempotency_key AS idempotencyKey, retry_count AS retryCount, next_retry_time AS nextRetryTime, fail_reason AS failReason, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM order_refund_task WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND refund_type = #{refundType} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, order_id AS orderId, refund_type AS refundType, amount, status, idempotency_key AS idempotencyKey, retry_count AS retryCount, next_retry_time AS nextRetryTime, fail_reason AS failReason, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM order_refund_task WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, order_id AS orderId, refund_type AS refundType, amount, status, idempotency_key AS idempotencyKey, retry_count AS retryCount, next_retry_time AS nextRetryTime, fail_reason AS failReason, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM order_refund_task WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'FAILED') AND (next_retry_time IS NULL OR next_retry_time <= NOW()) ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE order_refund_task SET status = 'FAILED', retry_count = retry_count + 1, next_retry_time = #{nextRetryTime}, fail_reason = #{failReason}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{expectedStatus}
UPDATE order_refund_task SET status = 'PENDING', next_retry_time = NULL, fail_reason = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'FAILED'
